title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MASALISI PRIMARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEMERY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO PAYAPANG IBABA PRIMARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11823 / 66 OG No. 21, 5192-17 (May 25, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4333, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MASALISI PRIMARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LEMERY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO PAYAPANG IBABA PRIMARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Masalisi Primary School in the Municipality of Lemery, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to Payapang Ibaba Primary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
